## Discussion

This value is specified in the Smart Card token extension‚Äôs `NSExtensionAttributes` property list by the `com.apple.ctk.aid` attribute. If this attribute specifies multiple AIDs, this parameter represents the application identifier found on the card that is already preselected.  If the `com.apple.ctk.aid` attribute is not present, no application is automatically preselected and the value of this property is `nil`.

# aid

**Instance Property**

The ISO 7816-4 application identifiers of the Smart Card.

## Declaration

```swift
var aid: Data? { get }
```

## Discussion

This value is specified in the Smart Card token extension‚Äôs `NSExtensionAttributes` property list by the `com.apple.ctk.aid` attribute. If this attribute specifies multiple AIDs, this parameter represents the application identifier found on the card that is already preselected.  If the `com.apple.ctk.aid` attribute is not present, no application is automatically preselected and the value of this property is `nil`.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Reference/InfoPlistKeyReference/Articles/AppExtensionKeys.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40014212] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Reference/InfoPlistKeyReference/Introduction/Introduction.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40009247].
